title: Fix handling of ref types in initial values of type parameters

features.name: parameterized class with typedef type parameter default
features.description: Code should include a parameterized class with a type parameter that has a typedef as its default value

features.name: type parameter with ref type as default value
features.description: Code should include a parameterized class where one type parameter defaults to another type parameter (reference type)

features.name: parameterized class instance assignment from typed parameter
features.description: Code should include assignment between parameterized class instances where the type is derived from a typedef or ref type parameter
